title: [release-1.22] Backport two test fixes
body:
Backported from #2820

I need this for https://github.com/podman-container-tools/container-libs/pull/1010

comments.body:
thanks, I merge then, container-libs seems happy with this.

For now I do not have plans to enable CI here, but I guess it might make sense to allow this branch being used for new releases in case of CVE fixes? Or we just cherry-pick/vendor without CI and hope they work?

I agree CI would be nice if we are going to support that branch for a while; I don’t have much of an opinion on priority. I expect _most_ back ported fixes would be in vendored libraries, so at most a build test might be sufficient (OTOH backporting the full thing without divergence would be more consistent).
